betterquesting:10.desc:8:
The §6Basalt§f (advancedrocketry:basalt) is a §6single block§f world-gen block that spawns on §6volcanic planets§f in the AR progression — Mars-like worlds, Mercury, and lava planets with §6basaltic flows§f. The block has a §6dark gray, dense appearance§f and is the §6signature rock block§f of high-temperature planetary missions.

§6Production Path (world generation)§f:
- Source: §6Basalt§f is generated by AR's planet dimension system on volcanic planets
- It cannot be crafted — it must be §6mined from a volcanic planet§f during a landing mission
- Drops: 1x §6Basalt§f when mined with any pickaxe

The block is §6purely cosmetic§f in its base form but is the §6prerequisite§f for the §6Geode§f (10076) chain. Basalt is the §6most common volcanic rock§f in the AR mod, covering §670% of volcanic planet surfaces§f.

This quest is a prerequisite for the §6Geode§f (10076) and the §6Crystals§f (10077) — both of which are §6volcanic planet materials§f found inside basalt deposits. The questline teaches the player that §6rare resources§f are often §6embedded in common rocks§f and require §6specialized extraction§f.

§eTip§f: Geodes are most often found §6embedded in basalt blocks§f, so when mining a basalt deposit, look for §6slightly different colored§f blocks (geodes have a §6subtle shimmer§f). Use a §6Diamond Pickaxe§f with §6Fortune III§f for maximum geode drops per basalt block. The geode will §6drop itself§f when broken, which can then be processed for §6Crystals§f (10077).
